exampleSentencesTranslated: I really like eating cakes with my family during the Mid-Autumn Festival.
Every year, children eagerly wait for the Mid-Autumn Festival to carry lanterns.
I plan to give gifts to the kids during the Mid-Autumn Festival this year.
exampleSentences: Em rất thích ăn bánh vào dịp trung thu cùng gia đình.
Mỗi năm, trẻ em háo hức chờ đợi trung thu để rước đèn.
Anh dự định tặng quà cho các cháu vào trung thu năm nay.
notes:
Trung thu is the Mid-Autumn Festival, a big Vietnamese holiday for children and families. It happens on the 15th day of the 8th lunar month (rằm tháng Tám).

It’s a noun and often appears as Tết Trung Thu (full name) or just trung thu in casual speech. You’ll hear common pairings like bánh trung thu (mooncakes) and đêm trung thu (Mid-Autumn night).  

Think of it as Vietnam’s “kids’ festival” with lanterns, mooncakes, and family gatherings.
notes_md:
**Trung thu** is the Mid-Autumn Festival, a big Vietnamese holiday for children and families. It happens on the 15th day of the 8th lunar month (rằm tháng Tám).

It’s a noun and often appears as **Tết Trung Thu** (full name) or just **trung thu** in casual speech. You’ll hear common pairings like **bánh trung thu** (mooncakes) and **đêm trung thu** (Mid-Autumn night).  


Think of it as Vietnam’s “kids’ festival” with lanterns, mooncakes, and family gatherings.
